politics.headline: White House, Congress Face New Budget Pressure as Negotiations Continue
politics.content:
HEADLINE
White House, Congress Face New Budget Pressure as Negotiations Continue

SNAPSHOT
Washington enters another funding fight with lawmakers weighing short-term fixes, spending priorities and political fallout.

KEY STORYLINES
- Budget talks remain the central Washington storyline.
- Party leaders are balancing policy demands with deadline pressure.
- The next phase will test whether lawmakers can avoid another shutdown fight.
